title: U.S. Resumes Dollar Transfers to Iraq After Monthslong Suspension
summary_full: The Trump administration had halted the shipments to Iraq as part of its efforts to pressure the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran.
summary_public: The Trump administration had halted the shipments to Iraq as part of its efforts to pressure the Baghdad government to distance itself from Iran.
